seo.title: Meet DJ Brendan — Who's to Say Foundation
seo.description: Brendan Bukowski found his loudest voice in music. Meet DJ Brendan and the Remix Studio at Who's to Say Foundation.

listing.title: Meet DJ Brendan
listing.summary: Brendan builds confidence and connection through playlists, transitions, and his own voice on the mic.
listing.label: Participant Story · Vol. 02
listing.imageAlt: Brendan at the radio mixing board under a DJ Brendan neon sign

hero.eyebrow: A Who's to Say story · Vol. 02
hero.title: Meet DJ Brendan. Where Broadway beats meet unbound potential.
hero.lead: Brendan Bukowski found his loudest voice in music. In the Remix Studio he navigates his own playlists, practices transitions, and goes on air as DJ Brendan.
hero.imageAlt: Brendan at the radio mixing board, headphones around his neck, under a DJ Brendan neon sign and an ON AIR light

sections.heading: He built his own Top 5 musicals, Broadway Mix.
paragraphs: Brendan has a keen ear for classic rock and a heart full of Broadway show tunes. He made a playlist that is entirely his and navigates it with real independence, cueing the next number and practicing introductions between songs.
For Brendan, music is a way to engage confidently in a dialogue about something he is passionate about.

sections.heading: From fan to DJ: mastering the mix.
paragraphs: Brendan creates his playlist, navigates Spotify, sets up collaborative shares, and practices transitions between Broadway anthems.
With personalized coaching, he is practicing the craft of a radio host one song introduction at a time.
sections.imageAlt: Brendan singing into a microphone with on-screen lyrics
sections.caption: Singing along · Remix Studio

sections.heading: Powered by the Remix Studio.
paragraphs: The Remix Studio gives Brendan real gear and a place to explore, experiment, and be heard.
The work is about building digital media skills at his pace and around his passion.
sections.imageAlt: Brendan on the DJ Brendan Radio set wearing headphones with a microphone in front of him
sections.caption: DJ Brendan Radio · on set

sections.heading: A pathway built around his strengths.
sections.lead: For Brendan, music creates opportunities to express, create, and broadcast.

items.title: Express
items.body: Music becomes a setting for communication through songs he loves.

items.title: Create
items.body: Playlist navigation, microphone technique, and transitions turn interest into practice.

items.title: Broadcast
items.body: DJ Brendan Radio gives him a real format for sharing his work.

sections.heading: His name in lights, his playlist on the system, his voice on the mic.

items.imageAlt: DJ Brendan on a concert stage with a DJ BRENDAN video wall
items.caption: DJ Brendan · on stage

sections.heading: Help make room for the next creative voice.
sections.body: Support studio time, accessible tools, and mentorship for more young adults.
